name: Bugly (Tencent)
description: Tencents mobile crash and ANR reporting SDK for iOS, Android and Unity, widely used across Chinese apps.

seo.title: Bugly (Tencent) — Crash Reporting
seo.meta_description: Bugly (Tencent): Tencents mobile crash and ANR reporting SDK for iOS, Android and Unity, widely used across Chinese apps.

when_to_use: ANR detection and crash reporting for Chinese Android apps
Unity game crash reporting for China mobile game studios
iOS crash tracking for apps distributed in Chinese app stores

pros: Mature iOS/Android/Unity crash and ANR reporting
Widely adopted across Chinese mobile apps
Free tier sufficient for many studios
cons: Integrations outside Tencent cloud are limited
review.verdict: Safe and cheap default for Chinese mobile/game teams; Western teams should stick with Sentry or Firebase.
review.best_for: Chinese mobile and game studios needing free crash/ANR data
review.not_for: Western apps with strict data residency requirements

lock_in.reason: Crash data tied to Tencent ecosystem
